name: White Trash
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients.
2. In a saucepan, slowly melt margarine, chocolate morsels, and peanut butter, stirring constantly. Do not boil.
3. Add vanilla extract and cool the mixture.
4. Pour the sauce over the cereal mix, about one-third at a time, and stir until well coated.
5. Pour the mixture into a large grocery bag and gradually add powdered sugar (about half a box at a time), shaking to combine.
6. Store in a tightly covered container.
This recipe makes enough for a crowd and is nice for gifts. It is a sweet version of the popular Nuts and Bolts. This was given to us Christmas 1991 by Mary Alice King of Dixie Union, Georgia.
